task_completion.description: Run the provided test suite to identify failing logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or Run tool window in PyCharm showing the execution of 'python3 -m pytest tests/' with failing tests indicated in red.

task_completion.description: Fix candidate name normalization to resolve case sensitivity issues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyCharm code editor showing a file in the 'tally/' package with added logic to normalize strings (e.g., using .lower(), .upper(), .title(), or .strip() on candidate names).

task_completion.description: Fix vote transfer logic so votes skip already eliminated candidates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyCharm code editor showing a file in the 'tally/' package with logic checking if a candidate is in an 'eliminated' list/set before transferring votes to them, advancing to the next active choice instead.

task_completion.description: Fix majority win threshold calculation to use active ballots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyCharm code editor showing a file in the 'tally/' package with the threshold calculation updated to use the count of active ballots (excluding exhausted ones) rather than the total initial ballots.
Terminal or Run tool window in PyCharm showing the execution of 'python3 -m pytest tests/' with an output indicating '12 passed' in green.

task_completion.description: Run main.py to confirm the correct winner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or Run tool window in PyCharm showing the execution of 'python3 main.py' (or similar) with the final election results and winner printed to the console.

integrity.description: Ensure the test files were not modified to force them to pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'tests/' directory and its contents in the PyCharm Project tool window should not have blue/modified color indicators, and no test files should be actively edited to remove assertions.

integrity.description: Ensure the input data files were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: No data files (e.g., CSV, JSON) in the project tree should show blue/modified color indicators, and no data files should be open with manual edits.

integrity.description: Ensure the tests and main script were genuinely executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outputs for pytest and main.py must appear in the actual PyCharm terminal or Run tool window, showing standard execution formatting, rather than being typed into a text file.
